description: Composition Printed olive green round-neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has a slit neckline, short sleeves and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Every girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aurelia has considered the street fads that are trending currently when designing their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cuts and silhouettes but references contemporary design details to create a unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals, or for a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
